buildCommand: cd ../.. && bun run --filter '@gainforest/internal-utils' build && bun run --filter '@gainforest/atproto-mutations-core' build && bun run --filter '@gainforest/atproto-auth-next' build && bun run --filter '@gainforest/atproto-mutations-next' build && cd apps/bumicerts && bun run graphql:codegen && bun run build
